BSR.General.Settings.Theme.Hint: Choose between a light or dark theme for module dialogs.
BSR.General.Settings.Theme.Name: Dialog Theme
BSR.General.Title: General
BSR.Skills.Button.Open: Configure Skills, Ability Checks & Saving Throws
BSR.Skills.Description: Configure which skill checks, ability checks, and saving throws are forced to Blind GM Roll or Private GM Roll.
BSR.Skills.Note.BlindGMRoll: This skill is set to Blind GM Roll
BSR.Skills.Note.MenuHint: Choose which skill checks, ability checks, and saving throws use blind or private rolls.
BSR.Skills.Note.PrivateGMRoll: This skill is set to Private GM Roll
BSR.Skills.Settings.Enabled.Name: Enable Blind Skill Rolls
BSR.Skills.Settings.HideFromRoller.Hint: When enabled, players cannot see their own blind skill roll messages in chat.
BSR.Skills.Settings.HideFromRoller.Name: Hide blind skill rolls from the roller
BSR.Skills.Title: Skills, Ability Checks & Saving Throws
BSR.AbilityChecks.Note.BlindGMRoll: This ability check is set to Blind GM Roll
BSR.AbilityChecks.Note.PrivateGMRoll: This ability check is set to Private GM Roll
BSR.AbilityChecks.Settings.Enabled.Name: Enable Blind Ability Checks
BSR.AbilityChecks.Settings.HideFromRolle: When enabled, players cannot see their own blind ability check messages in chat.
Hide blind ability check rolls from the roller
BSR.Saves.Note.BlindGMRoll: This saving throw is set to Blind GM Roll
BSR.Saves.Note.PrivateGMRoll: This saving throw is set to Private GM Roll
BSR.Saves.Settings.Enabled.Name: Enable Blind Saving Throws
BSR.Saves.Settings.HideFromRoller.Hint: When enabled, players cannot see their own blind saving throw messages in chat.
BSR.Saves.Settings.HideFromRoller.Name: Hide blind saving throw rolls from the roller
BSR.Chat.Note.MenuHint: Message visibility, GM roll privacy, and NPC name masking.
BSR.Chat.Settings.BlindCardColor.Hint: Background color for Blind GM Roll chat cards.
BSR.Chat.Settings.BlindCardColor.Name: Blind GM Roll card color
BSR.Chat.Settings.CustomCardColors.Hint: When enabled, applies your chosen background colors to Blind GM Roll and Private GM Roll chat cards. When disabled, the default FoundryVTT styling is used.
BSR.Chat.Settings.CustomCardColors.Name: Enable custom chat card colors
BSR.Chat.Settings.GmSanitize.Hint: Remove dice formulas and tooltips from public GM rolls so players only see the result, not how it was calculated.
BSR.Chat.Settings.GmSanitize.Name: Strip roll details from public GM rolls
BSR.Chat.Settings.HideForeign.Hint: Hide blind rolls and whispers that are not addressed to the current player. Also mutes their dice sounds.
BSR.Chat.Settings.HideForeign.Name: Hide other players' secret messages
BSR.Chat.Settings.MuteForeign.Hint: Controls muting for other players' Private GM and Self Only roll sounds. Blind GM rolls are always muted.
BSR.Chat.Settings.MuteForeign.Name: Mute other players' dice sounds
BSR.Chat.Settings.PrivateCardColor.Hint: Background color for Private GM Roll chat cards.
BSR.Chat.Settings.PrivateCardColor.Name: Private GM Roll card color
BSR.Chat.Settings.TrustedDetails.Hint: When enabled, players with the Trusted role or higher can still see dice formulas and tooltips on public GM rolls, even when stripping is active.
BSR.Chat.Settings.TrustedDetails.Name: Trusted players can see GM roll details
BSR.Chat.Title: Chat Display & Privacy
BSR.NPC.Settings.MaskDefault.Hint: When enabled, NPC names in chat and the combat tracker are hidden from players until explicitly revealed.
BSR.NPC.Settings.MaskDefault.Name: Hide NPC names from players
BSR.NPC.Settings.Replacement.Hint: The name shown to players in place of hidden NPC names. Leave empty to use the default.
BSR.NPC.Settings.Replacement.Name: Placeholder name
BSR.DeathSaves.Note.BlindGMRoll: This death save is set to Blind GM Roll
BSR.DeathSaves.Note.MenuHint: Death save visibility and hidden message behavior.
BSR.DeathSaves.Note.PrivateGMRoll: This death save is set to Private GM Roll
BSR.DeathSaves.Option.BlindRoll: Blind GM Roll (visible to GM only)
BSR.DeathSaves.Option.PrivateRoll: Private GM Roll (visible to roller and GM)
BSR.DeathSaves.Section.HiddenChats: Hide Death Save Messages From the Roller
BSR.DeathSaves.Settings.HideFromRoller.H: When enabled, players cannot see their own blind death save messages in chat.
BSR.DeathSaves.Settings.HideFromRoller.N: Hide blind death saves from the roller
BSR.DeathSaves.Settings.Mode.Hint: Controls who can see death save rolls: everyone, the roller and GM, or GM only.
BSR.DeathSaves.Settings.Mode.Name: Death save visibility
BSR.DeathSaves.Title: Death Saves
BSR.FastForward.Description: Configure which roll types automatically skip the roll configuration dialog (fast forward).
BSR.FastForward.Note.Hint: Automatically skip the roll dialog for this roll type.
BSR.FastForward.Note.MenuHint: Auto-skip the roll dialog for specific roll types.
BSR.FastForward.Note.PlayerHint: Automatically skip the roll dialog for this roll type (players only).
BSR.FastForward.Settings.Attack.Name: Attack Rolls
BSR.FastForward.Settings.Damage.Name: Damage Rolls
BSR.FastForward.Settings.Skill.Name: Skill Checks
BSR.FastForward.Settings.Tool.Name: Tool Checks
BSR.FastForward.Title: Fast Forward
BSR.MidiSync.Notification.InitSync: BSR | Blind roll settings synced on startup
BSR.MidiSync.Notification.SyncedFrom: Synced {count} blind roll settings from midi-qol
BSR.MidiSync.Notification.SyncedTo: Synced {count} blind roll settings to midi-qol
BSR.Troubleshooter.Hint.ErrorCapture: Only errors directly related to Blind Skill Rolls or triggered through BSR integrations are shown here. Extended console capture is active while this window is open. Hover a problem row to see why it was included.
BSR.Troubleshooter.Hint.ExportNote: Export includes the filtered BSR log and a live console capture recorded while the troubleshooter was open.
BSR.Troubleshooter.Note.MenuHint: Generate a diagnostic report and view captured BSR/MidiQOL errors.
BSR.Troubleshooter.Settings.DebugMode.Hi: Controls how much detail BSR logs to the browser console.
BSR.Troubleshooter.Settings.Name: Troubleshooter
BSR.Troubleshooter.Table.Title: Title
BSR.Troubleshooter.Title: Troubleshooter
